description:
You are a desertification researcher for UNEP preparing a brief for the UN Convention to Combat Desertification. You need to demonstrate how the global distribution of major hot deserts is controlled by the subtropical high-pressure belt. A mandate with full background is at ~/Desktop/desertification_analysis_mandate.txt.

Using NASA Panoply, analyze the sea level pressure dataset (~/PanoplyData/slp.mon.ltm.nc) and the precipitation rate dataset (~/PanoplyData/prate.sfc.mon.ltm.nc) for the month of July. Export the global SLP map to ~/Documents/DesertBelt/slp_global_july.png and the global precipitation map to ~/Documents/DesertBelt/precip_global_j
